subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty and partner and associate of 'Abdu'l-Bahá in servitude at the Sacred Threshold of the Most Great Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت ابهی و سهیم و شریک عبدالبهاء در عبودیت آستان مقدس جمال کبریاء
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the power of words; of speech
